text: {"overallConclusion":"Intervention Z is harmless","inferences":[{"type":"supports","premiseIndexes":[0],"conclusionIndex":-1,"warrant":"If scientists unanimously agree that an intervention is harmless, then it is reasonable to conclude the intervention is harmless.","strength":"strong","defeaters":["The claim of unanimous agreement is false","The scientists cited are not qualified or relevant to the intervention"]},{"type":"undercuts","premiseIndexes":[1],"conclusionIndex":0,"warrant":"A claim that provides no citation, survey, review, or named scientific body lacks evidential support, thereby weakening its credibility.","strength":"moderate","defeaters":["Independent, credible evidence supporting the claim exists elsewhere","The lack of citation is due to confidentiality or proprietary constraints rather than lack of evidence"]}]}
